# Babula Shots Bodas — Wedding Photography Dominican Republic

> Professional wedding photographer covering the Dominican Republic since 2020. Destination weddings, beach ceremonies, resort weddings, civil and church ceremonies. 100+ weddings documented.

Owner: Michal Nikodem Babula
Contact: info@babulashotsrd.com · WhatsApp +1 809 720 9547
Rating: 4.9/5 from 98 Google reviews
Service area: Dominican Republic only
Languages: Spanish and English
Hours: Mon–Sun, 9:00–18:00 Atlantic Standard Time (UTC-4)
